PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var2')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var3')
        PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var4')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('va5')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var6')
      PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('5')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('6')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('7')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var2')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var3')
      PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('var1')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('var2')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('var4')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
          PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
      PsiElement(})('}')
